mapper.select: SELECT source_id, source_name_zh, source_name_en, year AS latest_year, rank_display AS latest_rank_display, rank_value AS latest_rank_value FROM ( SELECT rs.id AS source_id, rs.name_zh AS source_name_zh, rs.name_en AS source_name_en, re.year, re.rank_display, re.rank_value, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY rs.id ORDER BY re.year DESC, CASE WHEN re.rank_value IS NULL OR re.rank_value >= 9999 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END ASC, re.rank_value ASC) AS rn FROM ranking_entry re JOIN ranking_source rs ON re.source_id = rs.id WHERE re.deleted = 0 AND rs.deleted = 0 AND re.university_id = #{universityId} ) t WHERE rn = 1 ORDER BY latest_year DESC, source_id ASC
SELECT DISTINCT year FROM ranking_entry WHERE deleted = 0 AND source_id = #{sourceId} ORDER BY year DESC
